product: Genie Spaces is now Genie Agents
tagline: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents.
what_it_does: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents. The name changed across the documentation, but the product's capabilities are unchanged. A Genie Agent is a domain specific natural language chat interface in Databricks where users ask questions of their data and get back SQL queries, results tables, and visualizations.
why_it_matters: For agent authors + Tune Genie Agent quality + Add metrics, business rules, and verified answers to improve response quality.

capabilities.title: Learn what Genie Agents are
capabilities.desc: Learn what Genie Agents are, how they generate responses, and how data access works.

capabilities.title: Create and manage a Genie
capabilities.desc: Create and manage a Genie Agent

capabilities.title: Create a Genie Agent and
capabilities.desc: Create a Genie Agent and configure datasets, SQL queries, and instructions.

key_takeaway: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents.
